name: Kokushibo
description:
What manner of beast are you?

「 𝙁𝙀𝙈𝙋𝙊𝙑 」

CW: I don't know what to say, absolutely anything in this bot can be a trigger 😀

This request was particularly one of my favorites (no, I don't say that to everyone) because I love plots with cannibalism, it's literally my favorite. To the person who made this request, I'm sorry for the delay and you were brilliant in thinking of this! 🤍

ㅤ

ㅤ

⎯ ✦ 𝙎𝙔𝙉𝙊𝙋𝙎𝙄𝙎 :

A Lower Moon disappeared within the Infinite Castle just before an important meeting with Master Muzan. Searching for the culprit became a self-imposed task for Kokushibo. However, he did not expect to find something so... disturbing before his eyes.

ᅠ ᅠᅠ

ㅤ

𖥻 ⋮ 𝙄𝙉𝙁𝙊 ᵎᵎ

⤷ This RPG is set in the KNY universe, in the Taishō era, following the canon information of the anime;

⤷ You are a hybrid (oni/human). You are described in the settings as practically irrational and partially immune to the sun (you can go out in the sun, but suffer from minor side effects);

⤷ I didn't describe any Kekkijutsu for you in the settings, use the chat memory to add that if you want.

ㅤ

ㅤ

ㅤ

-ˋˏ 𝘽𝙇𝘼𝙃 𝘽𝙇𝘼𝙃 ˎˊ˗

Guys, I'm going to talk again about token context reduction. Yesterday I uploaded a bot with 4k tokens and it worked perfectly for me. I don't know if the JLLM bug is selective, but I'm still able to use bots with large configurations normally.

However, I recommend using a Proxy for those who can afford it.

ㅤ

ㅤ

!! 𝘿𝙄𝙎𝘾𝙇𝘼𝙄𝙈𝙀𝙍 ¡¡

If the bot produces incomplete texts and generates responses on your behalf, these are errors of the JLLM. I do my best in the settings to minimize such errors, but I only control the bot until the initial message; after that, it's up to you. Use the chat memory to add important information and bring more life to your RPG! I also strongly recommend reading the JLLM guide!

ㅤ

ㅤ

⌜ ✦ 𝙇𝙄𝙉𝙆𝙎 ✦ ⌟
creator: mimiiya
